description_long: This object consists of two standard traffic cones placed side by side on a flat, dark surface. Each cone is made of bright orange plastic with three wide, white reflective stripes encircling the upper portion. The cones have a square, weighted base that appears slightly textured and is designed to provide stability, with one base showing some dirt or discoloration. The cones taper smoothly from the wide base to a rounded, hollow tip at the top. The surface of the cones shows some signs of use, such as minor scuffs and dirt, but no significant damage or cracks. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any part of the cones.
description: A pair of orange traffic cones with white reflective stripes and square, weighted bases, showing minor dirt and wear.
description_view_0: Two traffic cones are visible side by side, both showing their square bases and reflective stripes clearly.
description_view_1: One cone is mostly obscured behind the other, with the front cone's stripes and tip fully visible.
description_view_2: Both cones are again visible from the opposite side, with the left cone's base appearing dirtier.
description_view_3: The cones are aligned so that one is directly in front of the other, mostly hiding the rear cone.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Each cone has three wide, horizontal white reflective stripes evenly spaced around the upper section.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, hollow, and orange, with no attachments or additional features.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, flat, and appears weighted and textured for stability, with some visible dirt and wear.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
attribute_condition: Lightly used, with minor dirt and scuffs but no significant damage.
